stemHtml: Which one of the following statements about the lift-to-drag ratio in straight and level flight is correct?

options.a: The highest value of the lift/drag ratio is reached when the lift is equal to the aeroplane weight.
options.b: The lift/drag ratio always increases as the lift decreases.
options.c: The highest value of the lift/drag ratio is reached when the lift is zero.
options.d: At the highest value of the lift/drag ratio the total drag is lowest.
